fallback_chain.description: Ordered model_id fallback chain; selector tries each in order if preferred-tier resolution fails.
fallback_chain.title: Fallback Chain

prefer_tier.description: Preferred tier to resolve from when this rule matches.
prefer_tier.title: Prefer Tier

rule_id.description: Stable rule identifier; surfaced in named-conflict errors.
rule_id.title: Rule Id

when.description: Predicate map (key → required value). All keys must match for the rule to fire; empty dict matches universally.
when.title: When

description:
Auto-select policy = ordered list of rules.

Cross-field invariant: rules are uniquely identified by `rule_id`; two
rules with identical `when` predicates but different `prefer_tier`
surface as a named conflict at construction time.

rules.description: Ordered selection rules; first matching rule wins.
rules.title: Rules

title: ModelSelectionPolicy
